name: Compound-X01 Industrial
description: Next-generation industrial elastomer engineered for high-friction safety applications and extreme environmental resilience.
technicalSummary: Excellent resistance to oils, solvents, and chemicals.
Thermal stability range from -40°C to +120°C.
Compliant with REACH and RoHS 3 standards.
Available in granules or extruded sheets (custom).
